case_title: MARCELA CALDERON VS. LILIANA ALBA SOLARES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, MARCELA AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARES, LILIANA ALBA AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA LILIAN'S DECORACIONES AND DBA LILIAN'S JANITOR & HOUSE CLEANING SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON, MARCELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLARES, LILIANA ALBA AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA LILIAN'S DECORACIONES AND DBA LILIAN'S JANITOR & HOUSE CLEANING SERVICES $4,273.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.36 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,555.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
